content:
The Click Five

Just The Girl - Acoustic Version 

Standard Tuning [ch]E[/ch] [ch]A[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]B[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] 

Capo 2nd Fret

Intro- [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch] 2x

Verse 1:

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                    [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She's cold and she's cruel but she knows what she's doing[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                 [ch]D[/ch]            [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She pushed me in the pool at our high school reunion[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]              [ch]Cadd9[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She laughs at my dreams, but I dream about her laughter[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                              [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]D[/ch] (one strum) [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
Strange as it seems, she's the one I'm after[/tab]

Chorus:
[tab]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]
Cause she's bittersweet[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She knocks me off my feet[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
And I can't help myself[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
I don't want anyone else[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
She's a mystery[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Em[/ch]      [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She's too much for me[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]
But I keep coming back for more[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]               [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]
She's just the girl I'm looking for[/tab]

Verse 2:

[tab][ch]G[/ch]                            [ch]D[/ch]             [ch]Cadd9[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She can't keep a secret for more than an hour[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                             [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Cadd9[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
She runs on one hundred proof attitude power[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                                [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]Cadd9[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch] [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
And the more she ignores me the more I adore her[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Cadd9[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch] (one strum) [ch]Cadd9[/ch]
What can I do?  I'd do anything for her[/tab]
